svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64; rv:150.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/150.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="UseCaseDiagram" id="2lvBLpJ0o2vGWuG1MVmX"> <mxGraphModel dx="1488" dy="831" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml

class User {
 - id: Int
 - name: String
 - email: String
 - password: String
 - phone: String

 + register()
 + login()
 + logout()
 + updateProfile()
}

class Category {
 - id: Int
 - title: String
 - icon: String

 + getProducts()
}

class Product {
 - id: Int
 - title: String
 - description: String
 - price: Double
 - stock: Int
 - imageUrl: String

 + addToCart()
 + getDetails()
}

class Cart {
 - id: Int
 - totalPrice: Double

 + addItem()
 + removeItem()
 + clearCart()
 + calculateTotal()
}

class CartItem {
 - id: Int
 - quantity: Int
 - subtotal: Double

 + updateQuantity()
}

class Order {
 - id: Int
 - status: String
 - totalPrice: Double
 - createdAt: Date

 + createOrder()
 + cancelOrder()
 + splitOrder()
}

class OrderItem {
 - id: Int
 - quantity: Int
 - subtotal: Double
}

class Payment {
 - id: Int
 - paymentMethod: String
 - amount: Double
 - paymentStatus: String

 + processPayment()
 + refund()
}

class DeliveryAddress {
 - id: Int
 - city: String
 - street: String
 - house: String
 - postalCode: String
}

class PickupPoint {
 - id: Int
 - title: String
 - address: String
 - latitude: Double
 - longitude: Double

 + selectPoint()
}

User \"1\" -- \"1\" Cart
User \"1\" -- \"*\" Order
User \"1\" -- \"*\" DeliveryAddress

Category \"1\" -- \"*\" Product

Cart \"1\" -- \"*\" CartItem
CartItem \"*\" -- \"1\" Product

Order \"1\" -- \"*\" OrderItem
OrderItem \"*\" -- \"1\" Product

Order \"1\" -- \"1\" Payment
Order \"1\" -- \"0..1\" PickupPoint

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="Tp5KzX_jYxw6hSw-FtQY-120"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="835" width="865" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

svg.style: width: 865px; height: 835px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: initial;
